name: Grilled Yellowfin with Mango-Papaya Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the tuna steaks on a grill and cook until fully done.
2. Mix together the coriander, white pepper, oil, and salt to create the marinade.
3. Brush the marinade over the tuna steaks before grilling.
4. Turn off the heat after grilling the tuna to prevent burning.
